summary: Iteration 3 verification complete. Backend 8/8 pytest passing (health, contact/quote/career CRUD, list endpoints, brochure-product quote). Frontend 50/50 assertions passing across Home, About, Products, all 9 category pages, mobile menu, asset accessibility and color theme audit.

ui_bugs.issue: Document <title> still 'Emergent | Fullstack App' (not branded). Carryover from iteration 1.

verified_assertions.static_assets: All 5 assets (logo.png, about.png, rahul_sawant.png, chetan_sharma.jpg, brochure.pdf) return 200 via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
verified_assertions.navbar: navbar-logo renders /assets/logo.png, navbar-cta-brochure is <a download href='/assets/brochure.pdf'>, navbar-cta-quote present.
verified_assertions.mobile_menu: mobile-cta-brochure and mobile-cta-quote visible after toggle on 390x844 viewport.
verified_assertions.footer: footer-registration shows CIN U46639PN2026PTC255333, GST 27AAUCM9057G1ZR, TAN PNEM48344C, Udyam UDYAM-MH-26-1136844. footer-cta-brochure is <a download> to /assets/brochure.pdf.
verified_assertions.home: No testimonial-* data-testids; no 'Voices from' text.
verified_assertions.about: about-hero-image src includes /assets/about.png. team-card-rahul-sawant img has /assets/rahul_sawant.png. team-card-chetan-sharma img has /assets/chetan_sharma.jpg.
verified_assertions.products_index: 9 category cards (water-management, paving-solutions, traffic-road-safety, landscape-architectural, drain-access-covers, building-materials, boundary-fencing, sanitation-solutions, utility-electrical). No products-dropdown-toggle exists.
verified_assertions.category_navigation: Clicking category-card-water-management navigates to /products/water-management with breadcrumb back-to-categories.
verified_assertions.water_management: All 6 subproduct buttons present. Default Hume Pipes detail shows NP2/NP3/NP4 and 150 mm – 2000 mm. upload-product-image-hume-pipes visible. grid-card-rcc-rings renders.
verified_assertions.paving_solutions: Paver Blocks shows finishes Glossy/Rough/Matte/Leather/Shot Blast/Stone Finish; colors Grey/Black/Red/Yellow; thickness 60/80/100 mm.
verified_assertions.traffic_road_safety: Kerb Stone shows profiles Bull Nose/Half Batter/Normal Champher/Rectangular/L Shape/Parabolic.
verified_assertions.drain_access_covers: RCC Chamber Cover shows LD/MD/HD/EHD load classes.
verified_assertions.sanitation_solutions: RCC Septic Tank & RCC Water Tank both show capacities 600/900/1200/1800.
verified_assertions.backend_apis: POST /api/contact, /api/quote, /api/career all return 200 with id (pytest verified).

action_items: Optional: Update /app/frontend/public/index.html <title> to brand site (carried over from iteration 1).
Optional: Provide RESEND_API_KEY in /app/backend/.env to enable real email notifications.
Server.py code-quality carry-overs: migrate @app.on_event to lifespan; extract shared person model; add pagination & rate-limiting (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: ProductImage upload stores base64 images in localStorage (5MB quota) — a single 2MB upload across many products will quickly hit the cap; consider compressing or persisting via backend.

ProductImage uses SHOW_UPLOAD = (process.env.REACT_APP_ENABLE_IMAGE_UPLOAD || 'true') === 'true' — upload UI is ENABLED by default in production. Recommend defaulting to disabled or gating by build flag before deployment.

Home.jsx still references PRODUCTS[i].img which does not exist in site.js (PRODUCTS items have no img field) — product-tile images on Home will be broken/empty . Not in current test scope, but visually empty.
Server.py same carry-over: @app.on_event deprecation, missing pagination, CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True (invalid combo), no rate limiting on public POST endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Test_ prefixed contact/quote/career rows inserted by pytest (kept for audit).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-3 requirements verified end-to-end. Public URL: https://infra-build-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py. Notable: Home.jsx renders where p.img is undefined in current site.js PRODUCTS — silently broken images on homepage product grid; may want to fix or remove that section.
